title: List Methods
content:
### List Methods Reference

---

### Adding Items

| Method | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `.append(x)` | Adds `x` at the end | `list.append(5)` |
| `.insert(i, x)` | Inserts `x` at index `i` | `list.insert(1, 5)` |
| `.extend(iter)` | Adds all items from iterable | `list.extend([5,6])` |

---

### Removing Items

| Method | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `.remove(x)` | Removes first occurrence of `x` | `list.remove(5)` |
| `.pop(i)` | Removes and returns item at `i` | `list.pop(1)` |
| `.clear()` | Removes all items | `list.clear()` |

---

### Finding Items

| Method | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `.index(x)` | Returns index of first `x` | `list.index(5)` |
| `.count(x)` | Counts occurrences of `x` | `list.count(5)` |

---

### Reordering

| Method | Description | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `.sort()` | Sort in place | `list.sort()` |
| `.reverse()` | Reverse in place | `list.reverse()` |

---

### Built-in Functions for Lists

| Function | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `len(list)` | Returns length | `len([1,2,3])` |
| `max(list)` | Returns max value | `max([1,2,3])` |
| `min(list)` | Returns min value | `min([1,2,3])` |
| `sum(list)` | Returns sum | `sum([1,2,3])` |
| `sorted(list)` | Returns new sorted list | `sorted([3,1,2])` |
| `any(list)` | True if any item is truthy | `any([0, 1, 0])` |
| `all(list)` | True if all items are truthy | `all([1, 2, 3])` |

---

> **Note:** `.sort()`, `.reverse()`, `.append()`, `.extend()`, `.insert()`, `.remove()`, `.pop()`, and `.clear()` modify the list **in place** and return `None`.
codeExample:
nums = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2]

print("Count of 1:", nums.count(1))
print("Index of 5:", nums.index(5))
print("Max:", max(nums))
print("Min:", min(nums))
print("Sum:", sum(nums))

nums.reverse()
print("Reversed:", nums)

nums.sort()
print("Sorted:", nums)

quiz.question: Which method returns the number of times a value appears in a list?
